_comment: MacDown settings schema (bead macdown-siy.1). The single source of truth
for which preferences may be overridden by the layered settings cascade
(app defaults -> .macdown.yml directory configs -> document front matter)
and how. CONSUMED BY: MPSettingsSchema (loader/validation) and the
RULE: listing a key here makes it OVERRIDABLE. Any preference NOT listed is
app-only (the safe default) -- a newly added preference cannot accidentally
become document/folder-overridable until it is deliberately added here.
type         : bool | int | double | string   (must match the property)
readableFrom : layers that may supply a value; default [app,folder,document]
appWritable  : may automated settings-writing persist it on the user's
behalf? yes | explicit | never. Default yes.
security     : true if an override WIDENS a capability; default false.
security key may be tightened by a layer silently, but
loosened beyond the app default only with explicit consent.
front-matter key vocabulary is intentionally NOT defined here yet; it is
designed with the readers in Phase 3 (macdown-siy.7 / macdown-2sd).
